content.en:
"If there are really top forces who dare to attack the human race, then don't blame me for being rude!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Anyway, with his strength, he was enough to match the high-level peak realm gods who had condensed nine eternal realm spirits, and he also had multiple copy bodies, which was equivalent to multiple high-level peak realm gods.

Except for a few extremely powerful top forces, he was hardly afraid of them.

Of course, if the supreme forces were to attack the Terrans, he would hardly be able to resist.

But the supreme forces will not look at the territories of the Terrans at all, and it is impossible to make a move against the Terrans.

......

Time flies.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

During this period, the Eternal Realm was very chaotic, and many forces were fighting and secretly fighting to seize the territory.

Of course, the major forces clash on a small scale, and if a full-scale battle breaks out for some territory, the losses will be great.

After all, the current realm of the Eternal Realm is only an ordinary realm, and it has not yet given birth to a top-notch treasure land, and there is not even a single entrance to the boundary of the Boundary Seam, so there is no need to fight hard for some ordinary territories.

But.

There are more and more resources in the eternal kingdom of the human race, after all, many of the eternal kingdoms of the human race were first established in the first batch of eternal kingdom borders that turned against 003, and now the resources of these territories have increased, and the treasure lands have been born one after another, which is much better than many eternal kingdoms.

It is precisely because of this that the Terrans are finally targeted by the top forces.

The realm of the gods.

Fire Phoenix Realm.

Skyfire Alliance.

This is a top force in the Fire Phoenix Realm, and the Fire Phoenix Realm is much stronger than the Dongwu Realm, with a total of more than thirty top forces, and the Heavenly Fire God Alliance is one of the top forces, with many high-level realm gods.

Now, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance has set its sights on the territory of the Terrans, and it is indeed the better position of the Terrans' eternal realms.

Moreover, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance did not send the Realm God to guard the Eternal Realm at the beginning, mainly because it was delayed by other things, and it did not participate in the division of the Eternal Realm at the first time, but it was slow to enter.

So, they want to occupy a good territory directly.

At this time.

The high-ranking realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance were discussing this matter.

Presiding over this meeting was the leader of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, a high-level peak realm god, the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God!

"Everyone, our Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance has been slow to enter the Eternal Realm, and now I propose to directly occupy a good territory, as the territory of the Eternal Realm Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance Branch in the future, as a top force, it would be too embarrassing to not have a good territory. The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said.

"Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, I propose to occupy a part of the territory of the human race!"

A high-level realm god said: "According to my understanding, the human race is just a powerful force, although there are high-level realm gods, but they have not yet reached the standard of a top-level power, they are considered quasi-top-level forces, but they have tens of thousands of eternal realms and a large number of other territories in the eternal realm!"

"Tens of thousands of eternal kingdoms, why do they have so many eternal kingdoms, even if the first batch enters, they can't snatch so many eternal kingdoms, right?"

"No, the Terrans are not the eternal kingdoms they have seized, but they have directly opened up, they don't know where they got a large number of eternal kingdoms, and they are also the forces of the eternal realms, so they can open up so many eternal kingdoms, and seize the opportunity to occupy a large number of territories first. "

"No matter how the territory of the Terrans came from, the problem now is that their strength does not deserve to have so much territory, and the territory of the powerful forces is more than the territory of the top forces, which is unreasonable. The other top forces don't care about the Terrans, but we have to take care of it!"

"Then occupy seventy percent of the territory of the human race, give them thirty percent of the territory, enough for them to live!"

"The Terrans will definitely not agree, so send some high-level realm gods to the Terrans and have a good talk with them. "

"What if they don't agree?"

"Don't agree? Then they agree (afae), as a top force, the Boundary Court Headquarters will not care about our actions, and it is impossible for the Boundary Court Headquarters to help a powerful force to sanction the top forces. "

In addition, he also sent three high-level realm gods who condensed the eight eternal realm spirits.

This scale is enough to easily destroy the average top power.

......

Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

This is the center of the Terran Terran Eternal Border, where many of the Realm Gods stay. []

Suddenly.

The void cracked, and the aura of a high-level realm god permeated out.

For the first time, Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue all sensed the aura of these high-level realm gods.

Ye Tian sensed these high-level realm gods, but he smiled slightly, and immediately asked his son Ye Xingchen to deal with this matter.

After all, the highest cultivation among these high-level realm gods has condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits, and this strength is not enough for him to come forward, and letting his son come forward can solve the problem.

Wow!

Ye Xingchen stepped over and intercepted these high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

"You are Ye Tian?" asked the Hell Realm God of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, but soon, he reacted, this should not be Ye Tian, after a little deduction, he knew that this should be another high-level Terran Realm God-Ye Xingchen.

Ye Xingchen said: "I am Ye Xingchen of the human race, the son of Ye Tian!"

"Your father, let him out!" said the Hellfire God.

Ye Xingchen smiled and said, "Everyone, just ask me for anything, my father is still in retreat, so I won't see you!"

"Presumptuous!"

These high-level realm gods roared.

They have so many high-level realm gods coming to the human race, and Ye Tian of the human race still dares not to come, this is to look down on their Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

As for what retreats can't come out, fools know that it's an excuse.

At this moment, they have already decided that this time they will not only want seventy percent of the territory, but eighty percent of the territory, so that the human race will know the fate of offending the Heavenly Fire God Alliance.

Rumble!!!!!

These high-level realm gods showed their aura one after another, oppressing Ye Xingchen.

"Ye Xingchen, whether your father comes out or not, we are high-level realm gods from the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance, and we are here to inform you that your human race must give up eighty percent of the territory to our Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance!"

High-level Realm Gods such as Hell Realm Gods said coldly.

"Eighty percent of the territory for you?" Ye Xingchen laughed as if he had heard the biggest joke, "Why are you?"

"With our strength!"

These high-level realm gods have the posture to make a move.

However, Ye Xingchen was not afraid at all, although he was not as good as his father Ye Tian's combat power, these high-level realm gods could not deal with him.
